overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game (Starfield) showing a character in a blue and green jacket ascending stairs and walking through a futuristic, metallic interior corridor toward an elevator. The environment features clean industrial design with illuminated stair edges, glass railings, and artificial lighting.

events.description: character begins ascending the staircase from the lower level
reaches the top of the stairs and approaches the doorway to the upper corridor

agents.ego_description: walking up a flight of illuminated metal stairs in a futuristic facility

entered.detail: wide metal staircase with illuminated edge strips
steps with glowing white edge lighting
metal handrails with glass panels on both sides of stairs
doorway at the top of the stairs leading to upper level
smooth gray metal wall panels with horizontal lines

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a modern staircase with illuminated steps and metal railings. The environment is a narrow, enclosed stairwell with metallic walls and artificial overhead lighting. The character moves steadily upward toward a doorway at the top of the stairs.

events.description: exits stairwell into open upper corridor with glass safety railing
turns left toward the elevator lobby area

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper corridor past a glass railing overlooking the lower level

entered.detail: transparent glass railing with metal frame overlooking lower floor
open space below the upper corridor showing the floor beneath
curved white reception counter with a potted plant behind it
tall green plant in a white pot on the reception desk

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairwell onto an upper corridor with a glass railing overlooking a lower lobby area. A white reception desk with a potted plant is visible across the open space. The character walks along the corridor before turning left toward an elevator.

events.description: enters the enclosed elevator lobby area
comes to a stop in front of the closed elevator doors

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping at the elevator doors in the lobby

entered.detail: pair of closed metallic elevator doors with frame
wall-mounted panel with buttons next to the elevator

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow elevator lobby with metallic walls and approaches the closed elevator doors. The open corridor and reception area are left behind as the character stops in front of the elevator control panel, waiting at the doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined industrial stairwell into an expansive futuristic lobby before concluding in a narrow elevator bay. It begins with the character ascending a modern staircase featuring illuminated steps and metallic walls, moving steadily upward toward a doorway. As the character emerges from the stairwell, the space opens into a wide upper corridor with glass railings that overlook a lower lobby area containing a white reception desk and a potted plant. The scene then shifts as the character walks along the corridor and turns left, leaving the open lobby behind to enter a secluded elevator lobby. Finally, the camera follows the character as they approach the closed metallic elevator doors and stop at the control panel.
